scope: Research-only external receipt extraction baseline; not identity-document evaluation.
interpretation: The source-isolated CORD receipt baseline is materially stronger than the FUNSD form baseline but evaluates a different label space and domain. Scores must not be compared as identity-verification accuracy.
data_quality_fix: CORD quadrilaterals are clamped and ordered after pixel-to-0..1000 normalization before LayoutLMv3 spatial embedding lookup.
next_gate: Complete approved identity-document external evaluation and field-level/cross-source calibration before declaring Phase 4 production-ready.
